Title: xOrder - Get Orders Query
Preconditions: User authenticated; orders exist for user; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { orders(filter: "" sort: "createdDate:desc") { totalCount items { id number status createdDate total { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify orders list
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] totalCount > 0
[DATA] items[] sorted by createdDate descending
[DATA] Each item has id, number, status, createdDate, total.amount
[DATA] status is a known enum value (New, Processing, Completed, etc.)
[DATA] Pagination: first/after params work to return subsets
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute same query → same results
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; totalCount = 0 when orders exist; sort order wrong; missing total.amount; GraphiQL shows auth error without token

Title: xOrder - Get Order Detail Query
Preconditions: Order exists; order ID/number known from GQL-011; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: order query by ID or number with full detail fields
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify full order detail
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] Full order object returned with correct id/number
[DATA] items[] (line items) non-empty with productId, quantity, price
[DATA] addresses[] non-empty; at least one address with city, countryCode populated
[DATA] inPayments[] non-empty; payment has paymentMethod and status
[MATH] Order totals (subTotal + shipping + tax = grandTotal within tolerance)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute query → same order detail
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; items[] empty; addresses[] empty; inPayments[] empty; GraphiQL shows auth error
